name: Saher Al-Liel
overview: The role of events in the seventies of the last century, when Kuwait was an example of human and material development and progress. The series deals with several social and humanitarian issues, such as social class, materialism, love of control and equality between men and women, through three families that struggle directly and indirectly among themselves.

trailers.title: مسلسل ساهر الليل الجزء الأول - الحلقة 1 - جاسم النبهان - عبدالله بوشهري
